Custom Sportswear Manufacturing from 50 Pieces

Updated: July 1, 2026 | By FABRIOZA

Looking for a custom sportswear manufacturer that understands your brand? FABRIOZA is an ISO 9001 certified clothing manufacturer based in Sialkot, Pakistan — the world's hub for athletic apparel production. We specialize in low MOQ manufacturing starting at just 50 pieces, making us the ideal partner for startups, gym brands, and established sports teams alike.

Why Choose FABRIOZA for Custom Sportswear?

Sialkot, Pakistan has been the global capital of sportswear manufacturing for decades. The city produces equipment and apparel for Olympic teams, Premier League clubs, and major sporting brands worldwide. FABRIOZA brings this heritage directly to your brand with factory-direct pricing and no minimum order quantity barriers.

50
Pieces MOQ
24h
Quote Time
2-3
Weeks Lead Time
$8-18
Per Unit

Our Custom Sportswear Capabilities

Moisture-Wicking Performance Fabrics

We source premium polyester, polyester-spandex blends, and recycled performance fabrics that wick sweat away from the body. Our fabric weights range from 140gsm for lightweight training tops to 280gsm for heavy-duty compression wear. Every fabric is tested for colorfastness, shrinkage, and durability before production.

Sublimation Jersey Manufacturing

Our all-over sublimation printing delivers vibrant, permanent colors that never crack, peel, or fade. Perfect for soccer jerseys, basketball uniforms, cycling kits, and team sports apparel. Sublimation embeds dye directly into the polyester fibers, so your designs become part of the fabric itself.

Compression Wear Production

We manufacture compression shorts, tights, base layers, and recovery wear using 4-way stretch fabrics with graduated compression technology. Ideal for CrossFit brands, MMA gyms, and professional athletic teams.

Gym & Activewear Lines

From seamless leggings to oversized gym tees, we produce complete activewear collections. Our cut-and-sew capability means any design is possible — high-waist bands, hidden pockets, mesh panels, reflective details.

Customization Options

  • Sublimation Printing: All-over, full-color designs on polyester
  • Screen Printing: Cost-effective for 1-4 color designs on cotton blends
  • 3D Puff Embroidery: Raised logos on hoodies, caps, and jackets
  • Heat Transfer: Names, numbers, and small details
  • Woven Labels: Custom neck labels, size tags, and care labels
  • Private Label Packaging: Poly bags, hang tags, branded tissue paper

Quality Control for Sportswear

Every garment passes our 4-stage quality inspection: fabric inspection (checking weight, color, defects), in-line production checks, AQL 2.5 sampling inspection, and final pre-shipment photos. Our 99.4% first-pass approval rate means fewer delays and lower costs for you.

Shipping & Delivery

We ship worldwide via DHL, FedEx, and UPS. Air freight delivers in 5-7 business days. Sea freight options available for larger orders (25-35 days). We handle all export documentation, customs paperwork, and tracking.

How to Order Custom Sportswear

  1. Send Your Design: Tech pack, sketch, or reference image to info@fabrioza.com
  2. Receive Free Mockup: Digital preview within 24 hours
  3. Approve Sample: Physical sample delivered in 5-7 days
  4. Production: Bulk manufacturing with photo updates
  5. Quality Check & Ship: Final inspection and worldwide delivery

Ready to Manufacture Your Next Collection?

Join 500+ brands. Free mockup. Free sample. Quote in 24 hours. Your design is 100% confidential.

Get Your Free Quote

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the minimum order for custom sportswear?

Our MOQ is 50 pieces per style. You can mix sizes and colors within that 50-piece minimum.

How long does sportswear production take?

Sample: 5-7 days. Bulk production: 2-3 weeks after sample approval.

Can you manufacture sublimation jerseys?

Yes, all-over sublimation printing is one of our specialties. We produce soccer jerseys, basketball uniforms, cycling kits, and more.

Do you offer private labeling for sportswear?

Absolutely. Custom woven labels, hang tags, poly bags, and branded packaging are all available.

What fabrics do you use for performance wear?

We use moisture-wicking polyester, spandex blends, recycled fabrics, and antimicrobial treatments. Custom fabric sourcing available.
